strengths: 19 years of demonstrated software engineering across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded, GIS, microservices) showing technical breadth and adaptability
Infrastructure and systems expertise at scale—designed microservices handling millions of requests/second, led Kubernetes deployments, built CI/CD infrastructure
Proven ability to architect and build complete platforms independently (GISCollective open-source platform currently used by Green Map globally)
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML product expertise or recognized AI platform track record—role specifically requires 'demonstrated products or platforms built with AI,' which is absent

Limited strategic partnership and director-level experience—resume shows execution-focused individual contributor roles; no evidence of strategic customer advisory, identifying platform 'future state,' or leading cross-organizational technical strategy
Cloud platform strategy expertise not demonstrated—has AWS CDK and Kubernetes operations experience, but no evidence of cloud architecture strategy, platform design, or customer adoption advisory

key_factors.factor: Strategic leadership and customer advisory experience missing
Strong infrastructure and systems architecture foundation

response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally skilled individual contributor with 19 years of proven engineering experience and demonstrated mastery of complex systems architecture. However, this Principal Engineer role specifically requires director-level strategic expertise in AI and cloud platforms, including customer advisory, platform strategy identification, and the ability to inspire others through insights on cutting-edge technologies. The resume shows primarily execution-focused roles with no track record of AI product development, cloud strategy work, or strategic partnership experience. His recent move to AI infrastructure at re:cinq (one month) is promising but insufficient evidence of the specialized AI strategy expertise required. He is underqualified for this specific strategic role despite being an excellent technologist.
